_documentation: Configuration for scripts/sync-board.py. See docs/board-bios-setup.md for the step-by-step on creating the Google Form, linking it to a Sheet, and filling in the URLs below. While `csv_url` is empty, the workflow runs but no-ops cleanly — so the workflow stays green while the Form is still being set up.
_columns_doc: Header names exactly as Google Sheets writes them for this form. Timestamp + email columns are localised to the form owner's account language (e.g. French → 'Horodateur' / 'Adresse e-mail'). If you ever change a question's text in the form, mirror the change here so the sync script keeps matching.

columns.name: Full name (with title — Dr / Prof / Mr / Ms)
columns.year_joined: Year you joined the EISS board / support team (optional)
columns.affiliation: Position and institution (e.g. 'Associate Professor — Leiden University')
columns.bio: Long bio (optional — used for the support-team display style)
columns.consent: I consent to publication of my bio on eiss-europa.com

_roles_doc: Allowed values for the 'Your role' Form dropdown. The Form question's options must exactly match the `label` values below. `kind` determines which output section the entry lands in (board → /board.html 'Board' grid with research themes; support → 'Support Team' grid with flowing bio). `tier` is the primary sort key — lower tiers appear higher on the page. Within a tier, entries sort by `year_joined` ascending (longest tenured first; missing year sorts to end), then by surname alphabetical. To add a new role: append to this list AND add the matching option to the Form dropdown.
